channel.title: SCA on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in SCA on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003): Vulnerability Discovery and Analysis
item.category: "CompTIA PenTest+ Course" , "Penetration Testing" , "Vulnerability Discovery" , "Vulnerability Analysis" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Offensive Security" , "Physical Security" , "Security Testing" , "ICS Security" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master vulnerability discovery and analysis for the CompTIA PenTest+ PT0-003 exam. Learn scan types, ICS assessment, validating results, physical security, and attack prioritization.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Software Development Security
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Software Development Security" , "Secure SDLC" , "DevSecOps" , "Application Security" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Secure Coding" , "CI/CD" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Software Development Security for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn the secure SDLC, maturity models, security controls in development, assessing software security, and secure coding standards.
